candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet total for current assets; exact semantic match to ACT.
Balancing line, not the reported total; inferior to direct total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not ACT.
Direct balance-sheet cash line; exact match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the period
candidates.why: Cash-flow reconciliation ending cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not period-end balance-sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Net change in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Change in cash flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Foreign exchange differences and cash impact of acquisitions and divestments
candidates.why: Reconciliation item, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation, Amortization and Impairment - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Non-cash adjustment, unrelated to CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash flows before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating subtotal, not cash balance.
Cash flow amount, not cash balance.
Cash flow amount, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Financing Activities
candidates.why: Cash flow amount, not cash balance.
Balancing line, not CHE.

variables.notes: Preferred balance-sheet cash line over cash-flow reconciliation lines.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet total for current liabilities; exact match to LCT.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities subtotal, not LCT.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Explicit current portion of long-term debt; valid STD component excluding leases.

There is a current-liability section row with this exact label; it captures short-term borrowings/current bank loans and should be included alongside current maturities when no clean total current borrowings line exists.
Short-term financing instrument under current liabilities; should be included in STD when present.
Current lease liabilities are financing-related but should be excluded from STD under the baseline rule.

variables.notes: No single clean current-borrowings total is shown. Selected minimal non-lease current debt components: current bank loans, commercial papers, and current maturities of long-term debt. Excluded 'Lease Liability' per rule.

candidates.why: Direct current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line; best match for TXP.
Tax asset/receivable, opposite of taxes payable.
Deferred tax, not current taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside candidate shortlist; confident because it is the explicit current tax liability line.

candidates.why: Direct reported PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred net/total PPE measure.
Gross component, inferior to total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the substantive PPE amount.

candidates.row_label: Investments in Tangible and Intangible Assets
candidates.why: Capex cash flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Intangibles, not PPE.
Direct balance-sheet total assets line; exact match to AT.
Direct cash-flow statement line for operating cash flow; exact match to OANCF.

variables.notes: Direct operating cash flow line from cash-flow statement.
